title: QuantumScape Stock Performance Drivers: Cobra Process and Battery Advances
text: QuantumScape's stock jumped 35% following announcement of major solid-state battery advances. The company developed a new manufacturing method called the Cobra separator process that is 25x faster at heat treatment compared to its previous Raptor method, while requiring minimal physical space. This manufacturing innovation addresses scalability challenges critical for commercial production. Battery performance advantages: potential 50-80% increase in driving range (900-1,000 miles per charge), faster charging via high-voltage direct current capability, enhanced safety through non-flammable solid electrolytes, demonstrated durability with tested batteries maintaining more than 95% of their energy capacity after over 1,000 charging cycles. Strategic validation: Volkswagen Group's PowerCo subsidiary signed a deal to produce up to 80 gigawatt-hours annually, validating market demand and supporting approximately one million electric vehicles yearly. The solid-state battery market was valued at $1.18 billion in 2024 and is projected to reach $15.07 billion by 2030, reflecting 56.6% annual growth.
